title: About Me
content: I am an undergraduate from the University of Chinese Academy of Sciences, Beijing, now pursuing a Bachelor’s Degree in Electronic Information Engineering (minor Physics). Apart from my majors, I am also interested in Competitive Programming and have essential competence in coding (prefer programming language: C/C++). The areas of research I am interested in is: Analog IC Design, RFIC Design. I am currently seeking potential scientific research projects regarding Analog IC / RFIC Design. My Portrait EducationBSc in Electronic Information EngineeringUniversity of Chinese Academy of Sciences, 2021 - nowMajor GPA: 3.98/4.00 (Rank 1/19)Minor: Physics ExperiencesSummer project in Institute of Semiconductors, Chinese Academy of Sciences, 2023.7 - nowDesigning a Bandgap Reference for optical communication circuits using Cadence Virtuoso & Mentor Calibre.Tutor: Student Coach of Algorithm Association at University of Chinese Academy of Sciences, 2023.7 - nowOrganized weekly, winter and summer training sessions.Established an Online-Judge System at University of Chinese Academy of Sciences. Leader of New Media Group, Student Union of Chinese Academy of Sciences, 2022.7 - 2023.7Managed content publishing for new media platform of Student Union of Chinese Academy of Sciences. Honors2023 Mathematical Contest In Modeling, Finalist (Top 3%)2022 China Collegiate Programming Contest, Guangzhou Site, Gold Medal2022 The 46th ICPC Asia-East Continent Final, Bronze Medal2021 The 46th ICPC Asia Regional Contest Jinan, Gold Medal ContactSchool Email Adress: xuyizhou21 [at] mails [dot] ucas [dot] ac [dot] cnPersonal Email Adress: chn_xuyizhou [at] outlook [dot] comGitHub Repository: EgoGreenalCodeForces Account: X_o_rCodeChef Account: X_o_r3
